title: FamilyMember
description: A user's role in a family. Drives parent-dashboard permissions per §7.4.

role.description: Guardians can see all members' Hifdh dashboards. Children's stats are visible only to family per §16.

displayName.description: Family-display nickname (e.g., 'Aisha (8)') overriding the user's global display name.

consentToShareStats.description: Past age ~10, child can toggle off parent visibility (strategy §7.4 daily-summary-only rule).
